title: Recover a release stuck in pending-upgrade
description: Diagnose a wedged release from helm history and hook state, then roll back or repair rather than force-deleting the release.
body: Use when helm shows a release in pending-upgrade or failed state. Do not delete the release secret/configmap to force it. Actions: run helm history to see the last deployed vs pending revision, check whether a pre/post hook job is stuck or failed, inspect events on the hook and workload pods, then helm rollback to the last deployed revision (or helm upgrade with a fix if the hook can complete). Validation signals include helm history returning to a clean deployed revision and the hook job completing or being removed. Risk boundary: production recovery is change-controlled; capture the failing revision and reason.
